query:
SELECT 
  i.id,
  i.productId,
  p.sku,
  p.description,
  i.tenantId,
  i.quantity,
  i.reservedQuantity,
  i.status,
  i.locationId,
  wl.code AS locationCode,
  wl.zoneId,
  wz.code AS zoneCode,
  wz.name AS zoneName
FROM inventory i
LEFT JOIN products p ON i.productId = p.id
LEFT JOIN warehouseLocations wl ON i.locationId = wl.id
LEFT JOIN warehouseZones wz ON wl.zoneId = wz.id
WHERE p.sku = '443060' OR p.description LIKE '%EXTENSOFIX%'
LIMIT 20;
